title: Applying online :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
You can apply for most visas online. You can upload supporting documents, photographs and also pay for your application online. Learn how to set up a RealMe account so you can apply online securely.
- How to apply for a visa online An overview of the online visa application process including how to choose a visa, the photos and file formats you need to upload, and how to pay online.

## How to apply for a visa online
An overview of the online visa application process including how to choose a visa, the photos and file formats you need to upload, and how to pay online.
- Enhanced Immigration Online Our online application system makes it easier to apply and process your application.

## Enhanced Immigration Online
Our online application system makes it easier to apply and process your application.
- Security and privacy of Immigration Online The security and privacy of your personal information is important to us. The system will allow information to be shared securely with other organisations online, subject to authorisation from users, who will also be able to review and update their own online data.

## Security and privacy of Immigration Online
The security and privacy of your personal information is important to us. The system will allow information to be shared securely with other organisations online, subject to authorisation from users, who will also be able to review and update their own online data.
- How to create a RealMe account You need a RealMe account to apply for a visa online. RealMe is designed to protect your privacy and is a service used by many New Zealand businesses and government departments.

## How to create a RealMe account
You need a RealMe account to apply for a visa online. RealMe is designed to protect your privacy and is a service used by many New Zealand businesses and government departments.
- Providing your passport for an online application How to provide a digital copy of your passport or send us your original passport so we can verify your identity.

## Providing your passport for an online application
How to provide a digital copy of your passport or send us your original passport so we can verify your identity.
- Common issues with passport scans Learn about common issues with passport scans to avoid your passport being rejected by our system.

## Common issues with passport scans
Learn about common issues with passport scans to avoid your passport being rejected by our system.
- Uploading documents and photos Find out what file formats documents must be in when you upload them into our system, and how to fix errors when uploading photos.

## Uploading documents and photos
Find out what file formats documents must be in when you upload them into our system, and how to fix errors when uploading photos.
- Including family in your online application Visitor visa applications can include partners and dependent children. Residence applications can include dependent children for partners of New Zealanders.

## Including family in your online application
Visitor visa applications can include partners and dependent children. Residence applications can include dependent children for partners of New Zealanders.
- Submitting a group application for temporary visas A group of applications for temporary visas can be made online and paid for all at once. Temporary visas allow applicants to stay in the country for a specific, limited time for visiting, studying, or working.

## Submitting a group application for temporary visas
A group of applications for temporary visas can be made online and paid for all at once. Temporary visas allow applicants to stay in the country for a specific, limited time for visiting, studying, or working.
- Bringing groups of people to New Zealand for an event If you are organising an event with 30 or more international visitors, let Immigration New Zealand know. You may consider a group application for faster processing.

## Bringing groups of people to New Zealand for an event
If you are organising an event with 30 or more international visitors, let Immigration New Zealand know. You may consider a group application for faster processing.
- How to pay using 3D Secure What 3D Secure authentication is, the process for using it with online payments, and how to troubleshoot if you have any problems.

## How to pay using 3D Secure
What 3D Secure authentication is, the process for using it with online payments, and how to troubleshoot if you have any problems.
- Access Immigration Online If you submitted an application using the old Immigration Online system, you can still access the application you submitted.

## Access Immigration Online
If you submitted an application using the old Immigration Online system, you can still access the application you submitted.
